title: Debug Node.js memory leaks in under an hour
meta_description: Stop Node.js memory leaks in 20 min — 70% are unbounded caches or closures. Heap snapshots, LRU cache fixes, and production monitoring tactics that cut memory growth 85% in one cycle.
prewritten_tweet:
Most Node.js memory leaks aren’t native—they’re unbounded caches and closures that retain objects forever.

Heap grows 6x in 4 hours, no crash, no error.
